provenance.source_corpus: Brown's Woods: An Early Gravel Pit Forest Restoration Project, Ontario, Canada

source_spans.text: In 1887, under the direction of William Brown, it was planted with 14 species of coniferous and deciduous trees
Canopy cover has increased from 85% to over 95% since 1930
In 1930, 31% of the forest canopy was coniferous; this figure has declined to only 5% today
The largest individual trees in the forest are Juglans nigra and Acer platanoides
The largest individual trees in the forest are Juglans nigra and Acer platanoides
seed predation may therefore be responsible for the regeneration failure of many of the woody taxa
seed predation may therefore be responsible for the regeneration failure of many of the woody taxa
in 1892 intensive maintenance ceased
the College of Agriculture made the important management decision not to intervene in the future development of the forest
this decision has added to its present scientific value
Coniferous trees still line the northeast, southeast, and southwest sides of the site
where deciduous litter cover is thick
substrate is covered with needle litter
herbaceous or woody understory vegetation is extremely sparse
an organic layer similar to the surrounding deciduous forests... has not yet developed

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:d006946dabe6
edges.original_sentence: In the 107 years since planting, the site has acquired some structural characteristics similar to the surrounding native deciduous forest, but it retains characteristics of an artificial community. Canopy cover has increased from 85% to over 95% since 1930

source_spans.text: In the 107 years since planting, the site has acquired some structural characteristics similar to the surrounding native deciduous forest, but it retains characteristics of an artificial community. Canopy cover has increased from 85% to over 95% since 1930

source_document.title: Brown's Woods: An Early Gravel Pit Forest Restoration Project, Ontario, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:e39ffb2ac2b7
edges.original_sentence: All regeneration was restricted to areas of the woods where conifers were absent and where deciduous litter was abundant

source_spans.text: All regeneration was restricted to areas of the woods where conifers were absent and where deciduous litter was abundant

source_document.title: Brown's Woods: An Early Gravel Pit Forest Restoration Project, Ontario, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:5da2da24d64a
edges.original_sentence: Seed-eating rodents and birds are common in the stand, and seed predation may therefore be responsible for the regeneration failure of many of the woody taxa in Brown's Woods

source_spans.text: Seed-eating rodents and birds are common in the stand, and seed predation may therefore be responsible for the regeneration failure of many of the woody taxa in Brown's Woods

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:42444d01c428
edges.original_sentence: Following Brown's departure, the College of Agriculture made the important management decision not to intervene in the future development of the forest; this decision has added to its present scientific value

edges.original_sentence: in the upland portions of the site where Pinus nigra, A. platanoides, and Larix decidua occur, the substrate is covered with needle litter, and herbaceous or woody understory vegetation is extremely sparse

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:6e06667b3f46
edges.original_sentence: the well-developed deciduous canopy imposes deep shade on the wide array of herbaceous plants. In the central part of the site subcanopy shrubs such as C. alternifolia and Prunus virginiana impose an additional layer of shade that appears to favor the development of the native as opposed to the alien flora
